events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer exactly one JSON object. Need assess scenario. Situation: conveyor systems on production floor, missing nip-point guards hazard, work actively in progress. Need decision fail (dangerous/non-compliant). Risk high or critical? Missing nip-point guards on conveyor in production active in-progress: severe entanglement/ crush amputation risk, immediate controls required. Work_stage in-progress. component_conditions: installed-defective? missing guards means installed-defective maybe non-compliant. percent_complete unknown maybe 80? value 0. sound_source empty? not audio. event_time 0, rate 0. order empty, workable empty. findings: missing nip-point guards; exposure to in-running nip point hazard; inadequate guarding of conveyor pinch points. actions: immediate lockout/tagout of affected conveyor; install proper nip-point guards per CEMA/OSHA 1910.212; inspect all similar conveyors; do not operate until guarded; train workers; secure LOTO. references: OSHA 1910.212(a)(1) guarding machine hazards, CEMA 575/2016? Need include CEMA. confidence 0.95. rationale brief. Ensure JSON valid raw no code fences. Need maybe percent_complete numeric estimate: 75? The work under review is conveyor systems in-progress, missing guards; overall progress maybe 80 but no info. We can put 80.

  "findings": [
    "Missing nip-point guards on conveyor system",
    "Exposed in-running nip points create entanglement/amputation hazard",
    "Conveyor not compliant with guarding requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately lockout/tagout the affected conveyor section",
    "Install OSHA/CEMA-compliant nip-point and pinch-point guards before energizing",
    "Inspect all similar conveyor systems for missing guards",
    "Verify guards are secure and cannot be bypassed",
    "Do not resume operation until guarding is complete and verified",
    "Brief affected workers on the hazard and control measures"
  ],
  "rationale": "Missing nip-point guards on an active conveyor expose workers to severe entanglement and crushing hazards, which is a direct violation of machine guarding requirements; the system must be shut down and guarded before work or production continues.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.212(a)(1)",

    "CEMA Safety Standards for Conveyor Guarding"
  ]
